title: Clear Sweet Portuguese Honey Pudding
description: A rich, velvety post-workout pudding made with clear honey, perfect for satisfying your sweet tooth in a healthy way.
instructions: Combine the cornstarch and a splash of almond milk in a saucepan to create a slurry.
Whisk until the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
Add the remaining almond milk, clear honey, and salt to the saucepan.
Cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, or until the pudding has thickened.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the coconut cream and vanilla extract.
Pour the pudding into individual serving cups or ramekins.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours, or until set.
Serve chilled, garnished with a drizzle of clear honey if desired.
If desired, top with fresh fruit or a sprinkle of cinnamon for added flavor and texture.
Store any leftover pudding in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld.
Note: If using fresh vanilla beans, scrape the seeds from the pod and add them to the pudding before chilling.
If desired, use a flavored extract like almond or lemon to give the pudding a unique twist.
